---
name: Device Confirmation
about: Confirm the module works on your device (or report it doesn't)
title: '[Device] '
labels: device-report
---

## Device Info
- **Model:** (e.g. RedMagic 8S Pro / NX729J)
- **SoC:** (e.g. Snapdragon 8 Gen 2)
- **Android version:**
- **ROM:** (Stock / LineageOS / etc.)
- **Root solution:** (Magisk vXX / KernelSU / APatch)

## Result
- [ ] Module installed successfully
- [ ] Module flashed, but device did not boot (boot loop)
- [ ] Module flashed, device boots, but streaming app still fails

## App Tested
- **App:**
- **Before module:** (e.g. EXO-1004 error)
- **After module:** (e.g. Plays fine in HD/SD/4K)

## Widevine Level (from DRM Info app)
- **Before module:** L1 / L2 / L3
- **After module:** L1 / L2 / L3

## Additional Notes
